description: Create a 3D model of an ASTM D638 Type IV tensile specimen ('dogbone') in FreeCAD. The specimen must have an overall length of 115 mm, width at ends of 19 mm, width at center (gauge) of 6 mm, gauge length (straight section) of 33 mm, transition radius of 14 mm, and thickness of 4 mm. The geometry must be a single closed solid symmetric about the X and Y axes. Save the result to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/tensile_specimen.FCStd.
